data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of SMS fallback to email, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for a fallback mechanism, yet there are no specific details or evidence demonstrating that this requirement is implemented or functioning as expected. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary evidence to confirm the implementation of the SMS fallback to email is missing.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of SMS fallback to email.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the SMS fallback to email requirement.
